_comment: Unified Outlook Scanner — 4 jobs, 1 schedule. Edit to enable/disable jobs or change patterns.

mentee_classification.description: Team Sunny email routing + CC compliance

pricing_import.description: Scan Harry pricing emails, download, import Parquet

knowledge_ingest.description: Email JSONs + outlook .msg to per-customer knowledge Parquet

nelson_customer_sort.description: Move khách Nelson emails (59 customers) to DIRECT/FWD/CNEE folders — Pass 2 after MenteeSort
nelson_customer_sort._note: LIVE since 2026-04-18 21:00 — verified 25/25 correct on first run. 3 bug fixes applied (folder path, gmail domain, FWD vs FW).

reply_processing.description: Scan Outlook Inbox — process real replies, bounces, auto-replies from CNEE prospects. Calls inbox_scanner.run_scan().
reply_processing._note: Job #6 — wired 2026-04-19. Code in handlers.py was written but never called from scheduler.

panjiva_weekly_check.description: Monday 06:00 — scan data_panjiva/incoming/ for new .xlsx files, run panjiva_clean pipeline automatically
panjiva_weekly_check._note: Disabled by default. Enable when you want Monday auto-import. Upload via /api/panjiva/upload for manual runs.
